title: Food Poisoning 食物中毒
scene: Anna吃了不干净的食物后肚子疼，妈妈带她去看医生。

lines.en: Doctor, my daughter has a bad stomachache.
My tummy hurts and I feel like throwing up.
When did it start? What did you eat today?
lines.zh: 什么时候开始的？你今天吃了什么？

lines.en: I ate some ice cream from the street vendor.
lines.zh: 我吃了路边小摊的冰淇淋。

lines.en: Did the ice cream look fresh?
lines.zh: 那个冰淇淋看起来新鲜吗？

lines.en: It was melted a little. Maybe it was bad.
lines.zh: 有一点化了。可能是不好的。

lines.en: It sounds like food poisoning. You need to drink water.
lines.zh: 听起来像是食物中毒。你需要多喝水。

lines.en: Yes. I will give you some medicine. Take it after meals.
lines.zh: 会的。我给你开些药。饭后吃。

lines.en: Thank you, Doctor. I will not eat street food again.
lines.zh: 谢谢医生。我再也不吃路边摊了。
